primary_question: Whether EOF-PC1 is eligible to adjudicate V1 old-index T3 V→P weakening.

t3_diagnosis.counter_evidence: PC1 cannot adjudicate old-index pair weakening if either side is not aligned with the old-index space.
t3_diagnosis.allowed_statement: EOF-PC1 is in the same problem space as V1 old indices only if both V and P PC1 align with old-index spaces.
t3_diagnosis.forbidden_statement: Do not use EOF-PC1 to refute V1 T3 weakening when PC1 is not aligned with V1 old-index space.

t3_diagnosis.primary_evidence: T3 old-index PC1 lag_tau0_class=stable_lag_dominant; T3 old-old stable pair count=4.
t3_diagnosis.counter_evidence: If old-index aggregate PC1 remains stable while individual old pairs drop, the weakening is pair-level rather than aggregate-space decoupling.
t3_diagnosis.allowed_statement: This diagnostic separates pair-level weakening from old-index aggregate-mode weakening.
t3_diagnosis.forbidden_statement: Do not equate many failed individual pairs with aggregate old-index space decoupling without checking old-index PC1.

t3_diagnosis.primary_evidence: T3 raw abs r=0.212; doy-residual abs r=0.212; window-centered abs r=0.212.
t3_diagnosis.counter_evidence: If PC1 relation drops after day/window controls, EOF-PC1 may mainly reflect seasonal progression/background mode.
t3_diagnosis.allowed_statement: EOF-PC1 has more adjudication value if its relation survives seasonal/background controls.
t3_diagnosis.forbidden_statement: Do not treat raw EOF-PC1 correlation as V1-style evidence if it collapses after seasonal controls.

t3_diagnosis.counter_evidence: EOF-PC1 cannot refute stable-lag pair weakening if EOF-PC1 itself is tau0-coupled, same-day dominant, or weak under the same lag-vs-tau0 logic.
t3_diagnosis.allowed_statement: Use V1-style lag-vs-tau0 classification, not raw correlation alone, when comparing EOF-PC1 with V1/V1_1.
t3_diagnosis.forbidden_statement: Do not say EOF-PC1 contradicts V1 if EOF-PC1 is not stable-lag-dominant in T3.

t3_diagnosis.counter_evidence: EOF-PC1 needs old-index alignment, seasonal-control robustness, and V1-style stable lag in T3 before it can adjudicate V1's T3 weakening.
t3_diagnosis.allowed_statement: Only if all prerequisites pass can EOF-PC1 be used as a serious counterpoint to V1 T3 weakening.
t3_diagnosis.forbidden_statement: Do not use EOF-PC1 as a judge of V1 T3 weakening when any prerequisite fails.

guardrails: This audit does not use highlat branch as the adjudication criterion.
EOF-PC1 can adjudicate V1 only if it aligns with old-index spaces, survives seasonal controls, and is V1-style stable-lag in T3.
Old-index aggregate PC1 distinguishes pair-level weakening from aggregate-space decoupling.
